claims.claim: Israel's main companies search URL is ica.justice.gov.il/GenericCorporarionInfo/SearchCorporation?unit=8 (Rasham HaChevarot / Rashut HaTagidim).
claims.method: WebSearch May 2026 returned this as the first result for 'רשם החברות'.

claims.claim: Basic company info is free on the registrar website (number, name, type, limited/unlimited, status, address, purpose, fee debts, breach-of-law flag); full nesach chevra is paid (approximately 53 NIS / 15 EUR, 2026).
claims.method: WebSearch confirmed free basic info plus paid full extract at this URL.

claims.claim: Chevra Baam (Ltd.) incorporation fee in 2026 is 2,559 NIS online / 3,123 NIS paper.
claims.source: https://www.digitalawyer.co.il (cross-checked with PKF/Britcpa Israeli CPA guides, May 2026)
claims.method: WebSearch returned 'company registration fee for 2026 is 3,123 ₪, online discount approximately 500 ₪, payment 2,559 ₪'.

claims.claim: Company (chevra) 2026 annual fee is 1,338 NIS until 31 March, 1,777 NIS from 1 April; Partnership 2026 annual fee is 1,333 NIS until 31 March, 1,771 NIS from 1 April.
claims.raw_snippet: אגרה שנתית חברה פרטית 2026: 1,338 ש"ח עד 31 במרץ, 1,777 ש"ח מ-1 באפריל. אגרה שנתית שותפות 2026: 1,333 ש"ח עד 31 במרץ, 1,771 ש"ח מ-1 באפריל.
claims.method: WebSearch on PKF Amit Halfon 2026 fee guide and gov.il registrar fee schedule returned distinct company vs partnership figures.

claims.claim: Israel has FOUR company-status values: pe'ila (active), be-piruq (in liquidation), nimekhqa (struck off), mufrat hok (in breach of law). The original skill only listed three.
claims.source: https://www.gornitzky.co.il (legal analysis on company status), https://www.mishpati.co.il/article/7681
claims.method: WebSearch on company status codes confirmed 'in breach of law' as the fourth published status, triggered by unpaid annual fee or missing report.

claims.claim: Amutot and CHL'Tz are not searchable on the main ica.justice.gov.il page; they live on GuideStar (guidestar.org.il), the Ministry of Justice's consolidated NPO portal, with free extracts.
claims.method: WebSearch returned guidestar.org.il as primary NPO portal; MoJ Rasham Amutot page links out to it.

claims.claim: Israel has no operational UBO (Ultimate Beneficial Owner) registry as of May 2026. A Ministry of Justice memorandum was published on 2025-06-26 for public consultation, with public comments closing 2025-07-17.
claims.method: WebSearch May 2026 confirmed status is still 'preliminary stages and has not yet been enacted into law'.

claims.claim: When Israel's UBO registry is enacted, it will NOT be publicly accessible (limited to authorities and obliged entities). 25% ownership threshold and full identification required.
claims.method: WebSearch returned 'the registry itself will not be publicly accessible' and the 25% threshold from the Israeli MoJ memorandum summary.

claims.claim: Insolvency cases opened on or after 2019-09-15 are searchable at insolvency.justice.gov.il/poshtim/main/tikim/wfrmlisttikim.aspx under the Insolvency and Economic Rehabilitation Law 5778-2018.
claims.method: WebSearch returned the case-list URL and confirmed the 2019 effective date for the new regime.

claims.claim: The official receiver was renamed from 'Apotropos Klali' to 'ha-memuneh al chadlut pira'on ve-shikum kalkali' (Insolvency and Economic Rehabilitation Commissioner) when the Insolvency Law 2018 took effect.
claims.source: https://origilatadv.co.il (Ori Gilat law office insolvency guide, updated 2026); https://www.nevo.co.il/law_html/law00/154362.htm
claims.method: WebSearch on 'הממונה על חדלות פירעון' and the underlying law text.

claims.claim: data.gov.il publishes the bulk ica_companies dataset (Ministry of Justice) accessible via CKAN API at https://data.gov.il/dataset/ica_companies.
claims.method: WebSearch returned the dataset URL; data.gov.il documented as CKAN-backed.

claims.claim: Reshumot (Yalkut HaPirsumim) is Israel's official gazette publishing liquidation notices, creditor calls, and dissolution petitions; 2026 issues are published continuously (e.g., issue from 1 March 2026 cited).
claims.method: WebSearch returned a March 2026 Yalkut HaPirsumim PDF, confirming ongoing 2026 publication.

claims.claim: Partnership extract is requested at https://ica.justice.gov.il/Request/OpenRequest?rt=PartnershipExtract; partnership-extract review fee is 12 NIS online (2026).
claims.method: WebSearch returned URL plus PKF 2026 fee guide for partnership-related charges.

claims.claim: Company number format prefixes: 51- standard company / 58- amuta / 55- partnership / 57- agudat shitufit. 9 digits total.
claims.method: Cross-checked with existing entity-types.md plus Legalmondo Israel registry overview.

claims.claim: Public companies' ownership and director changes flow through Maya (maya.tase.co.il) ISA disclosure portal, in addition to the registrar.
claims.method: Existing reference; ISA Maya remains the canonical immediate-disclosure portal in 2026.

claims.claim: Israeli Tax Authority registration types (Osek Patur, Osek Morsheh) are tax VAT-registration categories administered by Reshut HaMissim (SHAAM), NOT corporate forms at the companies registrar.
claims.method: Pre-existing fact in skill; still accurate under 2026 VAT regime.

claims.claim: Israeli companies registry stores company names primarily in Hebrew; searching by English trading name often returns no results even for English-marketed companies.
claims.method: Pre-existing gotcha; behavior unchanged in 2026 UI.
